title: hibiscus goossensii
intro: Hibiscus goossensii, also known as the African rosemallow or red hibiscus sabdariffa, is a plant species that belongs to the mallow family. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its calyx, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including high blood pressure and digestive issues. The health benefits of hibiscus goossensii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as a natural diuretic. Hibiscus goossensii can be consumed as a herbal tea, added to soups, or used as a ingredient in various medicinal preparations, including capsules and tinctures.
